subject: Scorbunny — a small white rabbit-like Pokemon with orange markings, depicted in a cheerful pose in an outdoor setting
description: A small bipedal rabbit creature with white fur and orange accent markings stands in a dynamic, lively pose. Its ears are long, its expression energetic and eager. The creature appears to be mid-kick or bouncing on its feet. The background suggests an outdoor urban or structured environment with warm orange and blue tones — buildings or fencing in the background. The overall feel is cheerful and youthful, befitting a starter Pokemon.
foreground: small white bipedal rabbit creature with orange markings in a lively active pose
background: outdoor setting with warm-toned structures and blue sky elements
emotion: energetic and eager — bouncy stance, forward motion suggested
